name: node-json-schema-traverse
title: node-json-schema-traverse
description:
Json schema traversal package
Traverse JSON Schema passing each schema object to callback.
This library helps to traverse a JSON schema to callback.
This is a dependency of npm.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-json-schema-traverse because Json schema traversal package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-json-schema-traverse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-json-schema-traverse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-json-schema-traverse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
